verdict.answer_first: A states the core reason in the very first sentence: "Postman isn't subject to CORS — browsers are."
verdict.decisiveness: A is more decisive with the statement: "The fix lives on the server, not the client."
verdict.actionability: B is more actionable due to its scannable structure with headers like "How to pin down which one it is" and "The fix", and because it provides a copy-pasteable code block of the required server headers.
